title: Chambered Nautilus swimming in Deep Ocean Coloring Page
seoTitle: Chambered Nautilus swimming in Deep Ocean Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Enjoy coloring this detailed chambered nautilus with complex spiral shell segments. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Chambered Nautilus swimming in Deep Ocean has up to 90 small, suckerless tentacles that it uses to grab crabs and small fish from the seafloor.
The chambered Chambered Nautilus swimming in Deep Ocean is a 'living fossil' that has remained virtually unchanged for over 500 million years.
